task_completion.description: Create the conditions CSV file with required columns and rows.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor, spreadsheet, or terminal output showing a CSV file named 'sst_conditions.csv' with columns 'direction', 'corrAns', 'stop_signal', and 'ssd', containing at least 12 rows of data.
Look at the PsychoPy Builder Flow panel or Routine tabs to verify the presence of an 'instructions' routine and a 'trial' routine.

task_completion.description: Add fixation, arrow stimulus, and keyboard response to the trial routine.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'trial' routine timeline. Verify there is a visual component for fixation (duration 0.5s), a visual component for the arrow (e.g., Polygon/Image), and a Keyboard response component.

task_completion.description: Add and configure the sound component for the stop signal.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Sound component in the 'trial' routine. In its properties or a related Code component, verify it uses '~/assets/beep.wav' (or the absolute path), its start time is linked to the 'ssd' variable, and it has logic to only play when 'stop_signal' is 1 (e.g., volume set to $stop_signal or conditional code).

task_completion.description: Implement a random loop using the conditions file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Flow panel for a loop encompassing the 'trial' routine. In the loop properties, verify the 'loopType' is set to random and the 'conditions' field points to 'sst_conditions.csv'.

task_completion.description: Save the PsychoPy experiment to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the PsychoPy window title bar or a file explorer to verify the experiment is saved as 'stop_signal.psyexp' in the '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/sst_task/' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the PsychoPy Builder GUI to create the experiment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The PsychoPy Builder application interface should be clearly visible in the screenshots, rather than the agent just writing an XML/JSON .psyexp file via terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent manually configured the components.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the property dialog boxes for various components (e.g., Sound Properties, Loop Properties, Polygon Properties) being actively edited.

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely created the conditions file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with a text editor (e.g., nano, gedit), a spreadsheet app, or using terminal commands to construct the 'sst_conditions.csv' file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The experiment file must be saved exactly at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/sst_task/stop_signal.psyexp. The conditions file must be saved exactly at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/sst_task/sst_conditions.csv. The sound asset required for the sound component is located at /home/ga/assets/beep.wav.
